name: White Chocolate Chunk Brownies
recipeIngredient: 5 oz White chocolate, cut into 3/4-inch pieces
3/4 cup Pecans, coarsely chopped and toasted
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Butter a 10-inch diameter pan and line the bottom with parchment.
3. In a heavy medium saucepan, combine coffee powder and 1 tbsp water. Stir over medium-low heat until the coffee dissolves.
4. Add sugar and butter, stirring until the butter melts.
5. Pour mixture into a large bowl and let cool to room temperature, stirring occasionally.
6. Add eggs and coffee liqueur to the butter mixture; whisk to combine.
7. Sift flour, baking powder, and salt in a small bowl.
8. Add dry ingredients to the butter mixture and stir until well blended.
9. Stir in chocolate and pecans.
10. Pour batter into the prepared pan.
11. Bake until a tester inserted in the center comes out almost clean, about 35 minutes.
12. Cool in the pan on a rack.
13. Run a small sharp knife around the sides of the pan to loosen brownies.
14. Turn out onto a plate; peel off parchment.
15. Cut into wedges to serve. Serve with caramel sauce and ice cream.
